dict.string:
on alfred_script(q) set targetName to "Jabra Speak2 55 MS" set blueutilPath to "/opt/homebrew/bin/blueutil" set jqPath to "/opt/homebrew/bin/jq"
-- Get list of paired devices with name and address set pairedDevices to do shell script blueutilPath & " --paired --format json"
-- Extract the MAC address of the device named 'foo' set deviceAddress to do shell script "echo " & quoted form of pairedDevices & " | " & jqPath & " -r '.[] | select(.name == \"" & targetName & "\") | .address'"
if deviceAddress is "" then display dialog "Bluetooth device '" & targetName & "' not found among paired devices." buttons {"OK"} with icon caution return end if
-- Try connecting to the device try do shell script blueutilPath & " --disconnect " & deviceAddress display notification "Connected to " & targetName with title "Bluetooth" on error errMsg display dialog "Failed to connect to " & targetName & ":\n" & errMsg buttons {"OK"} with icon stop end try
end alfred_script
No arg for reconnect, on for connect and off for disconnect

on alfred_script(q) set targetName to "Jabra Speak2 55 MS" set blueutilPath to "/opt/homebrew/bin/blueutil" set jqPath to "/opt/homebrew/bin/jq"
-- Get list of paired devices with name and address set pairedDevices to do shell script blueutilPath & " --paired --format json"
-- Extract the MAC address of the device named 'foo' set deviceAddress to do shell script "echo " & quoted form of pairedDevices & " | " & jqPath & " -r '.[] | select(.name == \"" & targetName & "\") | .address'"
if deviceAddress is "" then display dialog "Bluetooth device '" & targetName & "' not found among paired devices." buttons {"OK"} with icon caution return end if
-- Try connecting to the device try do shell script blueutilPath & " --connect " & deviceAddress display notification "Connected to " & targetName with title "Bluetooth" on error errMsg display dialog "Failed to connect to " & targetName & ":\n" & errMsg buttons {"OK"} with icon stop end try
end alfred_script

on alfred_script(q) -- Version: 1.1.0 -- Clean reconnect to Bluetooth device "Jabra Speak2 55 MS" -- Requires: /opt/homebrew/bin/blueutil and /opt/homebrew/bin/jq
set targetName to "Jabra Speak2 55 MS" set blueutilPath to "/opt/homebrew/bin/blueutil" set jqPath to "/opt/homebrew/bin/jq"
-- Fetch list of paired devices set pairedDevices to do shell script blueutilPath & " --paired --format json"
-- Extract MAC address set deviceAddress to do shell script "echo " & quoted form of pairedDevices & " | " & jqPath & " -r '.[] | select(.name == \"" & targetName & "\") | .address'"
if deviceAddress is "" then display dialog "Bluetooth device '" & targetName & "' not found among paired devices." buttons {"OK"} with icon caution return end if
-- Check connection state set isConnected to do shell script blueutilPath & " --is-connected " & deviceAddress
-- If connected, disconnect first if isConnected is "1" then try do shell script blueutilPath & " --disconnect " & deviceAddress delay 1 on error errMsg display dialog "Failed to disconnect " & targetName & ":\n" & errMsg buttons {"OK"} with icon stop return end try end if
-- Try connecting try do shell script blueutilPath & " --connect " & deviceAddress display notification "Reconnected to " & targetName with title "Bluetooth" on error errMsg display dialog "Failed to connect to " & targetName & ":\n" & errMsg buttons {"OK"} with icon stop end try end alfred_script
